title: Support and training
description: A career in the Armed Forces is career like no other – but it also comes with a unique set of challenges. We recognise the sacrifices our people make, and in return, we’ll do everything we can to make sure you’re looked after throughout your Army career and beyond.
text: A career in the Armed Forces is career like no other – but it also comes with a unique set of challenges. We recognise the sacrifices our people make, and in return, we’ll do everything we can to make sure you’re looked after throughout your Army career and beyond. On this page you can find information about health & wellbeing, welfare support, financial & legal support, support with deployment and the Armed Forces Covenant.
